title: Solar MCP Capability Registry Entry v1
description: Draft v1 schema extending capability.schema.json (Draft-07) for MCP-specific fields. Adds endpoint_type, input_schema, output_schema, auth_requirements, rate_limits. All base fields from capability.schema.json are preserved.

capability.description: Capability token (e.g. wiki.read, pdf.extract). Must match capability.schema.json:8 pattern.

provider.description: Plugin or server ID that provides this capability.

status.description: Runtime status. Matches capability.schema.json status enum.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of last status update.

endpoint_type.description: MCP transport type. mcp_stdio=subprocess with JSON-RPC over stdin/stdout. mcp_sse=server-sent events. mcp_http=HTTP REST.

endpoint_url.description: Endpoint URL for mcp_sse and mcp_http. Null for mcp_stdio (uses launch_cmd).

launch_cmd.description: Command array to launch MCP server subprocess (mcp_stdio only).

input_schema.description: JSON Schema for tool input parameters. APO uses this to validate arguments before dispatch.

output_schema.description: JSON Schema for tool output. APO uses this for verification_contract checks.

auth_requirements.description: List of auth mechanisms required. Empty = no auth required.

requests_per_minute.description: Max requests per minute. Null = unlimited.

requests_per_hour.description: Max requests per hour. Null = unlimited.

rate_limits.description: Rate limit policy. APO checks before dispatching to prevent quota exhaustion.

meta.description: Provider-specific metadata. Passed through from capability.schema.json.
